summary: Frontend-only regression for 5 reported bug fixes on /launcher. All 5 fixes verified: (1) Notification shade closes smoothly via testID='notif-close-btn' and testID='notif-shade-backdrop' (transform translates to -1080, pointerEvents becomes 'none'); (2) Notification cards use compact layout — small colored dot (8x8), single-line title, single-line body in '<App> · <text>' format, right-aligned time, and label shows 'NOTIFICATIONS · 4'; (3) Launcher page 1 renders exactly 6 fake app icons (mail, camera, vault, terminal, radar, compass) — all testIDs present; (4) IMMERSIVE pill (testID='enter-immersive-btn') is visible top-left with label 'IMMERSIVE', tapping opens focus-mode overlay whose hint text reads 'IMMERSIVE · double-tap or press ✕ to exit'; discoverability hint 'double-tap anywhere for Immersive' visible below top bar; (5) testID='ambient-particles' present on /launcher with 40 animated dots — sampled opacities include multiple mid-values (0.15–0.55, 29 dots in mid range after 1.8s), confirming animation is running. No blocking issues found. Non-blocking deprecation warnings observed: 'textShadow*', 'shadow*', and 'props.pointerEvents' are deprecated in RN web (pre-existing, not introduced by this iteration).

react_native_issues.component: Multiple components using shadow* style props
react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' on web. Non-blocking on native but noisy in web preview. Reference: launcher.tsx (immersivePill/topBar), AmbientParticles.tsx, FocusMode.tsx, NotificationShade.tsx quickTile.
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Reference: launcher.tsx:252 (focusHint), NotificationShade.tsx:119, FocusMode.tsx:135,187,313.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate deprecated 'shadow*' style props to 'boxShadow' (web) or wrap with Platform.select to silence warnings.
(Optional) Move pointerEvents from prop to style.pointerEvents for RN Web compatibility.
critical_code_review_comments: launcher.tsx FlatList with windowSize=3 renders all 5 pages simultaneously in DOM (32 total app-* nodes), but only page 1 (6 icons) is visible via horizontal paging — matches spec.
NotificationShade close flow correctly awaits withTiming callback before calling onClose via runOnJS — no race conditions.
AmbientParticles density scales with settings.particleDensity (24/40/60) — sensible defaults; particles are pointerEvents='none' so they don't block launcher taps.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 fixes for iteration 2 verified via Playwright at https://shield-interact.preview.emergentagent.com/launcher with viewport 375x667. Key testIDs verified working: enter-immersive-btn, open-shade-btn, notification-shade, notif-close-btn, notif-shade-backdrop, ambient-particles, focus-mode, focus-exit-btn, app-{mail,camera,vault,terminal,radar,compass}. Deprecation warnings for shadow*/pointerEvents are pre-existing and non-blocking.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
